title: LegacyMoves [Cobblemon]
description: LegacyMoves is a datapack for Cobblemon that adds back moves into Pokémons' moveset that were either event moves or removed in later generations, to bring movesets in line with Pokemon Showdown's Natdex format.
body:
LegacyMoves is a datapack for Cobblemon that adds back moves into Pokémons' moveset that were either event moves or removed in later generations, to bring movesets in line with Pokemon Showdown's Natdex format.

All legacy/event moves are added to Pokémon's move pools as egg moves, tm moves, and tutor moves, meaning that you can learn them any of those three ways.
